mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM supplier
( supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR representative_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
business_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
representative_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY supplier_id ASC
ORDER BY supplier_id DESC
ORDER BY supplier_name ASC
ORDER BY supplier_name DESC
ORDER BY created_at ASC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT #{perPageNum} OFFSET #{pageStart}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier
( supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR representative_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
business_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
representative_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT supplier_id FROM supplier WHERE supplier_id LIKE CONCAT('SUP-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '%') ORDER BY supplier_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO supplier ( supplier_id, supplier_name, business_number, supplier_type, representative_name, phone, email, address, address_detail, zipcode, status, settlement_method, bank_name, account_holder, account_number, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, note, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{businessNumber}, #{supplierType}, #{representativeName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{zipcode}, #{status}, #{settlementMethod}, #{bankName}, #{accountHolder}, #{accountNumber}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactEmail}, #{note}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM supplier WHERE business_number = #{businessNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE supplier SET supplier_name = #{supplier_name}, business_number = #{business_number}, supplier_type = #{supplier_type}, representative_name = #{representative_name}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{address_detail}, zipcode = #{zipcode}, status = #{status}, settlement_method = #{settlement_method}, bank_name = #{bank_name}, account_holder = #{account_holder}, account_number = #{account_number}, contact_name = #{contact_name}, contact_phone = #{contact_phone}, contact_email = #{contact_email}, note = #{note}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE supplier_id = #{supplier_id}
